title: Mendelevium
body:
**DO NOT USE ON WORLDS YOU CARE ABOUT! IT WILL CORRUPT!**

A mod made as a joke to lag out your game. Based off Sodium and simialar mods.
There is two new items you get, the ![Lag Detector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/602fe3f4a335afdcb2e84a2865c953aee53c8c6a.gif) lag detector and three ![Lag Reset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4a983f853af8121f4c379280d7a89c9bd51f5db.png) lag resets. Your game will extensively lag and crash unless you use one of these to reset the varible.

The crafting recipe for Lag Reset item.

![Crafting recipe for Lag Reset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4605e8b4db5fd02cdd82f54d522495d47f283f79.png)

The Glitch tornado structure.

![Glitch tornado](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f455c5992e542f27f888a19ec8ef4f31d20315a7.png)

My inventory after looting ~7 Glitch Tornados + Starting Inventory.

![Inventory after looting a few GT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c364ee1371968d5de7ceb989889cc5f4c1357e4.png)
